archetype: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST (Command Center Tactical variant)
design_philosophy: Functional brutalism. High data density prioritized over padding. The UI acts as a neutral, high-contrast scaffold for operational data. Color is reserved strictly for status communication (the 'Semaphore' system) and actionable metrics.

typography.strategy: The Swiss Brutalist - Rigid, highly legible, optimized for data scanning.

hierarchy.data_labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] font-medium text-zinc-500 font-mono

semaphore_system.description: CRITICAL: Used for 'llamadas a oficina' office status and attempt tracking.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse style layouts for tables and data grids. Expose the skeleton. Cards should have flat backgrounds (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle borders (border-zinc-800), and NO soft shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Crisp 1px borders. Use sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-sm or max 4px radius).
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only used for sticky headers or command palettes. bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800.

grids_and_layouts.overall_structure: Collapsible Left-Sidebar (240px) + Main Content Area with sticky top header for global filters.
grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: MODE B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Tight density for tables (py-2 px-3). Moderate density for widget containers (p-4 to p-6).
grids_and_layouts.table_layout: Compact tables with sticky headers. Horizontal scrolling enabled. Use monospace font for numeric columns (days_left, attempts, phone numbers).

components.navigation: Left sidebar with clear active states. Active: bg-zinc-800 text-white border-l-2 border-white. Inactive: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50.
components.cards: Cardless or 'Grid Borders' style. Flat rectangular blocks with 1px border. No drop shadows. Example: border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 p-5.
components.badges_and_pills: Used for Semaphore status. Sharp corners (rounded-sm), utilizing the semaphore_system colors.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Remove rounded corners on table wrapper. Add border-b border-zinc-800 to rows. Hover: hover:bg-zinc-800/30.
components.timeline: Cadence Timeline View (5-attempt plan) should use vertical line connectors (border-l-2 border-zinc-800) with circle nodes colored by status (Semaphore colors).
components.buttons: Tactical buttons. Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-zinc-800.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Size: 18px to 20px. Use for sidebar, actionable table headers, and status indicators.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp, immediate feedback. hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors duration-150.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Subtle -translate-y-[1px] on actionable cards. Table rows should instantly highlight on hover to aid scanning wide datasets.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Dark background with white text ensures readability.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='sidebar-nav-queue', data-testid='status-filter-rojo', data-testid='action-cambio-direccion'.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: NEVER use generic generic gradients or soft, muddy shadows.
Use Phosphor icons. NEVER use AI emojis (🤖, 🟢, 🔴). Implement actual SVG circles or badges for the semaphore system.
Ensure the 'Connectors Status Page' has manual 'Test' buttons and visible connection logs.
Ensure 'Queue Management' table has sorting and robust filtering (by semaphore status).
DO NOT use a transparent background for headers, modals, or dropdowns. They must be opaque (bg-zinc-950) or blurred.
Ensure 'Messages Log' visually distinguishes sent (e.g., align right, bg-zinc-800) vs received (align left, bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800).
The UI must be exclusively in Spanish as requested (LATAM context).
Use Sonner for toasts (yarn add sonner). Configure it to dark theme.
For charts in 'Metrics Dashboard', use Shadcn charts (Recharts) with stroke colors matching the semaphore palette where applicable.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install required fonts, @phosphor-icons/react, recharts, and sonner.
instructions_to_main_agent.theming: Apply dark mode universally. Do not build a light mode toggle; hardcode the dark tactical command center theme by forcing the 'dark' class on the HTML/body.
instructions_to_main_agent.implementation_order: 1. Layout Shell (Sidebar + Header). 2. Connectors Status Page. 3. Queue Management (Table + Semaphore). 4. Cadence Timeline & Tasks Management. 5. Metrics Dashboard.
